Extra Rewards Program

(Must Read) Extra Rewards to my Delegators

Since Epoch 435, All 340 ADA Fix Fee (Epoch Fee) Rewards of Operator will be shared manually among top 10 Delegators whose Active Stake have more than 1000 ADA as Extra Rewards. The sharing activity will implement in the first Epoch of each month and I will share directly to your wallets. More calculating details here.
- Update: Since Epoch 445, Fix Fee of the block-chain would reduce from 340 to 170 ADA as a result of CIP-0094 poll. So the Sharing Fix Fee Rewards program also changed to 170 ADA as well.
- Update: Since Epoch 520, top Delegators changed to 100. So 170 ADA Fix Fee (Epoch Fee) Reward of Operator will be shared among top 100 Delegators whose Active Stake have more than 1000 ADA as Extra Rewards.

As normally, after some epoch you delegated to a pool, the normal rewards you got from delegating are showed in [Staking center] -> [Your summary] -> [Total Rewards] in Yoroi wallet which can be withdraw in some simple step. This tool can help you to predict future rewards if you delegate to a specific pool crewardcalculator.
Please be noted that this is not included Extra Rewards if you delegate to my pool. When you delegate to BUDDA Pool, you will get some Extra Rewards beside your normal rewards ("Total Rewards" in Yoroi). The sharing program as above.
